title: The Plan to Strike Big Mom
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Sanji, Luffy, Nami, Big Mom, Bege as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: shore snore

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's only one time that I saw Mama's body suffer even the smallest injury...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The mother caramel photo incident, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Indeed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At her tea parties, the seat right in front of Mama

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is always reserved for a certain special photograph.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That picture is very important to big mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A photo?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Indeed! A photo of Mother Caramel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can think of it as big mom's one weakness!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mother Caramel is like Mama's life-saver, but little is known about her...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is she dead?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She apparently ran away some time ago. Even we family members don't know much about it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, when all this happened, Mama took to her knees with the shock...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And doing so scraped her knees! She bled!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And that moment, Mama's reaction was astounding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her face grew blue, and she cried out with a piercing, almost alien sound!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Symptoms quite similar to a violent fit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those around her could do little more than try to cover their ears and protect their eardrums!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some workers began to collapse, one after another!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because, in addition to that strange voice of hers, she's liable to even activate her conqueror's Haki.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All this just because some- one dropped a photo...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, when all this happened, Mama took to her knees with the shock...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And doing so scraped her knees! She bled!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I have been using this for my

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be honest, we were all quite surprised that regular red blood runs in her veins!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, when she enters that state, her body loses its toughness!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, what will happen I wonder, if one of us splits that precious photo of hers right in two?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Mama will be weakened!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll have at least 5 seconds to ourselves, without interference from anyone else!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And just then, the KX launcher will demonstrate its effects! Big mom will die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And news of her assassination will spread the world over!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... what about that voice? What if even we end up being unable to move?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't worry. I've got these!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The "invisible Symphonia system!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh, earplugs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If just splitting that photo in two is gonna cause that big of a ruckus,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'll use that time to save Sanji and his family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oi! quit actin' all cocky!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's going to be a 3 second gap between when that photo breaks and when big mom's fit will start!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just managing to survive those 3 seconds, where nothing will have happened yet and we're surrounded by enemies,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will be a miracle in and of itself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're gonna have you play that part, straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute! You're going to have Luffy be a decoy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bege! Nami and the others saved Lola! Why're you basically sentencing them to their death?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
